results.name: happy_path
results.claim: Bot generates anonymous proof, verifier accepts and identifies cred

results.name: external_unlinkability
results.claim: Two proofs from same credential have no shared public fields

results.name: operator_can_correlate
results.claim: v0.1 KNOWN: operator can match both proofs to same credential
results.detail: matched correctly (this is the v0.5 issue)

results.name: replay_blocked
results.claim: Same proof verified twice must be blocked on second use

results.name: no_witness_for_other_operator
results.claim: Proof made with operator A's witness doesn't verify against operator B's verifier

results.name: tampered_pseudonym
results.claim: Mutating proof.pseudonym after generation must fail verification

results.name: revoked_credential_blocked
results.claim: Bot whose credential is revoked cannot generate new anonymous proofs

results.name: expired_credential_blocked_at_prove
results.claim: Expired credential cannot generate new anonymous proofs

results.name: claim_filter_works
results.claim: verify_anonymous with claim filter rejects proofs for different claims
